response.justification: Bogdan is a technically broad and experienced engineer with solid full-stack and infrastructure depth, but he falls well short of the director-level AI strategy profile this role demands. His AI involvement is limited to roughly one year of MCP tooling work at re:cinq, with no demonstrated record of building or shipping AI products or platforms at scale, no advisory experience with strategic customers, and no advanced degree in an AI-related field. The role requires recognized industry-level AI expertise and the gravitas to shape cloud strategy and inspire organizations through disruptive change — a profile that does not yet match his career trajectory.
strengths: 20 years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and data infrastructure, easily satisfying the 15-year minimum.
Entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective (founder) and early startup roles (WatchUp, Apon), showing ability to build products independently end-to-end.
Hands-on engagement with emerging AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, demonstrating current relevance and willingness to learn.
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (one year) with no demonstrated AI products or platforms shipped at meaningful scale, which is a core requirement for this role.
No evidence of director-level IC scope — advising strategic enterprise customers, influencing organizational AI strategy, or thought leadership recognized externally in the AI space.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no cloud architecture depth beyond isolated use of AWS CDK, both of which are preferred qualifications for this position.
